headlines.title: Mariners Fall to Athletics 6-4
headlines.summary: Carlos Cortes, Nick Kurtz and Shea Langeliers each hit solo homers as Oakland overcame an early three-run deficit to defeat Seattle.

headlines.title: Mariners Finalizing Minor League Deal with Mitch Garver
headlines.summary: The Seattle Mariners and catcher Mitch Garver are working on a minor league contract agreement.

last_game.highlights: Mariners jumped to early 3-run lead but Oakland rallied with 3 home runs

headlines.title: Seahawks Eyeing Versatile Defensive Backs in Draft
headlines.summary: Brock Huard highlighted Arizona's Treydan Stukes as a speedy, playmaking chess piece for the Seahawks in the upcoming NFL Draft.
